scripts.dev: concurrently --names web,be --prefix-colors cyan,yellow "yarn workspace @brightwheel/web dev" "yarn workspace @brightwheel/be start:dev"
scripts.build: yarn workspace @brightwheel/web build && yarn workspace @brightwheel/be build
scripts.lint: yarn workspace @brightwheel/web lint && yarn workspace @brightwheel/be lint
scripts.typecheck: yarn workspace @brightwheel/web typecheck && yarn workspace @brightwheel/be typecheck
